verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There will come a time In a moment In a twinkling of an eye At the last trump The trumpet shall sound And the dead in Christ Shall rise up from the grave Then we which are alive Shall be changed From mortal to immortal one

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And shall be caught up with them In the cloud To meet the Lord in the air

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: So let us claim the year Of our freedom Let it echo throughout the land Let's anoint the trumpet to sound To meet the resurrected ones So we can go home to where we were before

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Where there's no pain, no more tears It's such a lovely place Prepared for you and me The place of eternity And we can be right there soon If we all stand in unity To claim our Jubilee
